creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)

Thanks, and sorry, I should have remembered, from bug 263949, the existence of the -all port. 

Writing this, now, in a way, that might help me to remember: 

multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins – a collection, with numerous 
   slave ports (and a runtime dependency on 
   multimedia/gstreamer1) – that does not require 
multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins-all – a meta-port, with numerous 
   gstreamer1 runtime dependencies, including the 
multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins-ugly collection 
   but not exactly all. 

----

Is it sanest to close this bug report, working as intended?
